description: Create an isometric piping diagram for a cooling water loop in Wondershare EdrawMax. The installation sketch must feature a vertical storage tank, a centrifugal pump, and a shell-and-tube heat exchanger connected by pipelines. Include isolation valves on the piping between the tank and pump, and between the pump and heat exchanger. Label the components 'Feed Tank T-100', 'Circulation Pump P-101', and 'Cooler HX-200', and include the title 'Cooling Loop Installation Sketch'. Save the project to /home/ga/Diagrams/cooling_loop_iso.eddx and export the final diagram to /home/ga/Diagrams/cooling_loop_iso.png.
